allow: Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\(json.dumps\(d, indent=2\)[:1500]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); data=d['data']; print\('Ward:', data['ward']['name'], 'AQI:', data['ward']['current_aqi']\); print\('Top source:', data['attribution']['top_source'] if data['attribution'] else 'none'\); print\('Forecast:', [f['predicted_aqi'] for f in data['forecast']]\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); [print\(w['ward_name'], 'priority=', w['priority_score'], 'urgency=', w['urgency']\) for w in d['data']]")
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d=json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\); print\('Rows:', len\(d['data']\), '| sample:', d['data'][:2] if d['data'] else 'empty'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\(f\\"ward: {d['ward_name']} | aqi={d['current_aqi']} | vuln={d['vulnerability_index']} | top_source={d['top_source']} | conf={d['attribution_confidence']}\\"\); print\(f\\"  priority: {d['priority_score']} \({d['urgency']}\)\\"\); [print\(f\\"  - {a['action_code']}: est_delta={a.get\('estimated_aqi_delta', '?'\)} method={a.get\('estimation_method', '?'\)}\\"\) for a in d['recommended_actions']]")

Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['meta']['count']\); [print\(f\\"  {r['ward_name']}: priority={r['priority_score']} urgency={r['urgency']} aqi={r['current_aqi']} source={r['top_source']} actions={[a['action_code'] for a in r['recommended_actions']]}\\"\) for r in d['data']]")
